name: WaultFinance
report: The attacker exploited the stake function in the WUSDMaster contract, which allows 1:1 conversion between BSC_USDT and WUSD while also performing a swap that unbalances the WaultSwapPair (BSC_USDT-WEX) pool, creating arbitrage opportunities. The attacker used flash loans to repeatedly call stake, manipulated the pool price, and ultimately profited approximately $930,000.
